entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop species studied in the research

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which a plant uses water for biomass production

entities.name: WATER-LIMITED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environments where water availability is restricted

entities.name: JL 24
entities.description: The wild-type parent line of groundnut used as a control

entities.name: DREB1A
entities.description: A transcription factor from Arabidopsis thaliana inserted into groundnut

entities.name: ARABIDOPSIS THALIANA
entities.description: The plant species from which the DREB1A gene was derived

entities.name: RD29
entities.description: A stress responsive promoter used to drive the expression of DREB1A

entities.name: SOIL DRYING
entities.description: The process of soil moisture depletion to which plants were exposed

entities.name: WELL-WATERED
entities.description: A water regime where plants are provided with sufficient water

entities.name: WATER-STRESSED
entities.description: A water regime where plants are subjected to water deficiency

entities.name: SCMR
entities.description: Soil plant analysis development chlorophyll meter readings used as a surrogate for TE

entities.name: SPECIFIC LEAF AREA
entities.description: The ratio of leaf area to leaf dry mass used as a surrogate for TE

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: The state of water deficiency in plants

entities.name: CARBON ISOTOPE DISCRIMINATION
entities.description: Measured as Δ13C, used as a potential surrogate for TE

entities.name: FRACTION OF TRANSPIRABLE SOIL WATER
entities.description: FTSW threshold values where transpiration declines upon soil drying

entities.name: VAPOUR PRESSURE DEFICIT
entities.description: The difference between saturation vapor pressure and actual vapor pressure

entities.name: GAS EXCHANGE
entities.description: The process of exchange of gases between the plant and the atmosphere
